creator: driesm@freebsd.org
text: You could always add a direct runtime dependency against lang/mono6.8. That should work. Maybe even use a binary alias for mono -> mono6.8 if the binary has the version number. The idea of this patch is rather that you can chose to use a newer version by specifying the default_versions = mono=6.8 in make.conf when building ports or in Poudriere.
